---
title: "ICU 一般照護 — ICU General Care"
---

## 教學講義 Handouts

- [Esmolol 在重症加護的應用 教學講義.md](Esmolol 在重症加護的應用 教學講義.md)
- [Etomidate vs Ketamine 插管誘導用藥比較 教學講義.md](Etomidate vs Ketamine 插管誘導用藥比較 教學講義.md)

## LaTeX Files

- CHEST Implementation Science Practice Variability 2026 教學講義.tex
- ICM Broad-Spectrum Antibiotics 2024 教學講義.tex
- ICM Clinical Governance 2024 教學講義.tex
- ICM Metabolic Acidosis Buffering 2024 教學講義.tex
- ICM Stress Ulcer Prevention 2024 教學講義.tex
